arts.ttl: Preview: Huddersfield Town vs. Bolton Wanderers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Huddersfield Town and Bolton Wanderers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: 'I wouldn't want the job' - Sam Allardyce discusses Bolton Wanderers vacancy
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers legend Sam Allardyce says he does not want to replace Ian Evatt but would be interested in helping the club in another capacity.
